subject: Tiếng Anh 12
name: Part 5: Speaking
description: Thảo luận về bảo tồn động vật hoang dã

sections.heading: Speaking Skills
sections.content:
Chủ đề: Discussing wildlife conservation

Useful expressions:

  • Talking about threats:
  • If we don't protect habitats, animals will die.
  • Unless we stop poaching, species will disappear.
  • The more we destroy forests, the fewer animals survive.
  • Discussing solutions:
  • We should protect endangered species.
  • If we create more sanctuaries, we can save animals.
  • As long as we work together, there is hope.
  • Making comparisons:
  • Tigers are as endangered as rhinos.
  • Conservation is more important than ever.
  • The faster we act, the better the results.
  • Expressing opinions:
  • In my opinion, we should...
  • I think wildlife conservation is...
  • From my perspective...

exercises.question: Which expression discusses threats?
options: If we don't protect habitats, animals will die
exercises.explanation: Câu này thảo luận về mối đe dọa với mệnh đề điều kiện.

exercises.question: Complete: '_____ we stop poaching, species will disappear.'
exercises.explanation: Unless - trừ khi, nếu không.

exercises.question: Which phrase suggests a solution?
exercises.explanation: 'We should...' đề xuất giải pháp.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Tigers are _____ endangered _____ rhinos.'
exercises.explanation: As...as - so sánh bằng.

exercises.question: Which expresses an opinion?
options: In my opinion, we should protect wildlife
exercises.explanation: 'In my opinion...' bày tỏ ý kiến.

exercises.question: Complete: '_____ more we protect, _____ more species survive.'
exercises.explanation: The...the - so sánh kép.

exercises.question: Which discusses conservation benefits?
options: If we create sanctuaries, we can save animals
exercises.explanation: Câu này thảo luận về lợi ích của bảo tồn.

exercises.question: Complete: 'Conservation is _____ important _____ ever.'
exercises.explanation: More...than - so sánh hơn.

exercises.question: What should we do for wildlife?
exercises.explanation: Chúng ta nên bảo vệ môi trường sống và ngăn săn bắt trái phép.

exercises.question: Complete: '_____ long as we work together, there is hope.'
exercises.explanation: As long as - miễn là.

exercises.question: Which is a conservation action?
exercises.explanation: Tạo khu bảo tồn là hành động bảo tồn.

exercises.question: Complete: 'From my _____, conservation is essential.'
exercises.explanation: 'From my perspective' - theo quan điểm của tôi.

exercises.question: What does 'endangered species' mean?
exercises.explanation: Endangered species - loài có nguy cơ tuyệt chủng.

exercises.question: Complete: 'We need to be careful _____ habitat destruction.'
exercises.explanation: 'Be careful about' là cụm từ đúng.

exercises.question: Which phrase discusses urgency?
options: The faster we act, the better
exercises.explanation: Câu này nhấn mạnh sự cấp thiết.

exercises.question_text: Decide which are good ways to discuss conservation (True/False):
options: If we protect habitats, animals will survive.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Cách tốt dùng điều kiện. b) False - Quá tiêu cực. c) True - Đề xuất tốt. d) False - Động vật cần bảo vệ.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the expression is correct:
options: Unless we act, species will disappear.
Tigers are as endangered as rhinos.
The more we protect, the more species survive.
Conservation is more important than never.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Unless + khẳng định. b) True - As...as. c) True - The...the. d) False - Phải là 'than ever'.

exercises.question_text: Complete: _____ we protect habitats, animals will survive. (If/Unless)
exercises.explanation: If - mệnh đề điều kiện.
As...as - so sánh bằng.
Chúng ta nên bảo vệ (protect) loài có nguy cơ tuyệt chủng.
